sources.data_need: Tradable markets, rules, available contracts, bid/ask, liquidity, and order books
sources.recommended_source: Kalshi baseball calendar and public read-only Trade API discovery
sources.backup_source: Manual Kalshi UI review if public discovery is challenge-gated
sources.access_method: Existing discovery adapter JSON from public/read-only GET attempts
sources.daily_repeatability: Daily, subject to UI challenge gates and public endpoint availability
sources.limitations: Fixture mode: no live Kalshi source was called.

sources.data_need: Schedule, official game IDs, teams, status, probable pitchers, venue, and start times
sources.recommended_source: Official MLB Stats API / MLB Gameday
sources.limitations: Fixture mode: no live MLB source was called.

sources.data_need: Batter/pitcher splits, K%, barrel rate, hard-hit rate, HR profiles, pitch mix, and workload
sources.backup_source: FanGraphs or MLB Stats API derived stats when explicitly implemented later
sources.access_method: Existing Baseball Savant adapter JSON from discovery folder
sources.daily_repeatability: Daily when adapter discovery file is present; fixture mode is placeholder only
sources.limitations: Fixture mode: no live Baseball Savant/Statcast source was called.

sources.data_need: Wind, temperature, rain/postponement risk, roof, and weather-sensitive run environment
sources.backup_source: Venue roof/status notes and official game status once implemented
sources.access_method: Existing weather adapter JSON from discovery folder
sources.daily_repeatability: Daily when adapter discovery file is present; fixture mode is placeholder only
sources.limitations: Fixture mode: no live weather source was called.

sources.data_need: Kalshi market bid/ask, spread, volume, open interest

sources.limitations: Fixture mode: no live liquidity source was called.

notes: Source registry composed from existing discovery files only. No live fetches performed.
